text: Being here, I find myself enveloped by an atmosphere of anticipation and curiosity. The luminous blue light and glass entrance suggest a threshold into a space of innovation. Stepping inside, the vibrant "R+D" display and the creative use of text and technology on the walls fill me with reflective wonder. It feels as though I am expected to both observe and participate; the environment is designed to provoke questions about our connection to technology and each other. I am present, attentive, and quietly excited to see what new ideas and possibilities might emerge from this intersection of research and imagination.
